case_title: ANDRANIK TOPALYAN VS. MICHAEL RAY GIANNINI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANDRANIK TOPALYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL RAY GIANNINI IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/07/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE LATE PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO MARCH 6, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOPALYAN, ANDRANIK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GIANNINI, MICHAEL RAY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
-RETURN MAIL, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, UNABLE TO FORWARD, SENT TO DEFENDANT
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY TOPALYAN, ANDRANIK AS TO DEFENDANT GIANNINI, MICHAEL RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED FEB-04-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GIANNINI, MICHAEL RAY
